m5stack_sd_init.message0: Initializing the M5Stack onboard memory card
m5stack_sd_init.tooltip: Automatically select SPI or SDMMC for initialization according to the official board pinout, no need to set the pinout

m5stack_sd_available.tooltip: Initialize and detect onboard memory card

m5stack_sd_exists.tooltip: Check if a file or directory exists

m5stack_sd_read_text.message0: Read M5Stack memory card text file %1
m5stack_sd_read_text.tooltip: Reads a complete text file; returns an empty string on failure

m5stack_sd_write_text.tooltip: Write or append to text file

m5stack_sd_write_ok.message0: M5Stack memory card %1 file %2 content %3 successful
m5stack_sd_write_ok.tooltip: Write text and return whether the complete writing is successful

m5stack_sd_file_size.tooltip: Returns the number of bytes in the file; returns 0 on failure

m5stack_sd_remove_ok.message0: Deleted M5Stack memory card file %1 successfully
m5stack_sd_remove_ok.tooltip: Delete the specified file and return the result

m5stack_sd_mkdir.message0: Create M5Stack memory card directory %1 successfully

m5stack_sd_rmdir.message0: Delete M5Stack memory card empty directory %1 successfully
m5stack_sd_rmdir.tooltip: Delete empty directories and return results

m5stack_sd_rename.message0: M5Stack memory card renamed %1 to %2 successfully
m5stack_sd_rename.tooltip: Rename a file or directory and return the result

m5stack_sd_list.tooltip: Returns newline-delimited file names with a / at the end of the directory name

m5stack_sd_space.tooltip: Read memory card physical capacity, file system capacity or used space
